features: Bold Red Chilli Hair Colour – Transform your look with a vivid, high-impact red chilli hue. This premium permanent red hair dye formula delivers rich depth, radiance, and dimension that elevates your style with instant confidence.

Grey Coverage Root Hair Dye – Designed to blend regrowth effortlessly, this advanced crème system acts as a reliable hair dye for grey hair women, offering even tone and luminous results from root to tip.
Smooth Four-Step Application – Easy to apply in just four steps, this non-drip crème glides on for professional results at home. Perfect for all hair types, from sleek to textured, fine to thick.

Complete Application Kit – Each 2pk set includes 2x pairs of plastic gloves, 2x 40ml developer milk, 2x 40ml colour crème gel – a complete red permanent hair dye solution for seamless, confident colouring.

Make a Statement with Red – Embrace the vibrancy and boldness of this red chilli hair dye, crafted to turn heads with its striking tone, radiant finish, and confident colour that lasts. Perfect for bold transformations and standout style.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page DIY Hair Day? Grab Dyes, Brushes & Tools for Effortless At-Home Styling! 2pk Red Chilli Hair Dye Add To Basket 2pk Burgundy Hair Dye Add To Basket 2pk Black Hair Dye Add To Basket 2pk Mahogany Hair Dye Add To Basket Hair Dye Bowl & Brush Kit Add To Basket 5pk Hair Brush Set Add To Basket Pink Hair Towel Wrap Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 5 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 3.0 out of 5 stars 5 4.3 out of 5 stars 127 4.3 out of 5 stars 355 3.7 out of 5 stars 219 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £4.49 £ 4 . 49 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 — Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact & Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Designed for Grooming ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Home Use Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Gentle on Skin & Hair ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Does this red chilli hair dye cover grey roots effectively? Yes, it's designed for up to 100% grey coverage, helping blend regrowth while enhancing your hair’s bold and vibrant red chilli tone. Is this permanent red chilli hair dye suitable for at-home use? Absolutely. The 4-step crème formula glides on evenly for professional-looking colour results from the comfort of your home. What hair colours work best as a base for this red chilli dye? This no bleach hair dye works best on light to medium brown bases, adding rich, dimensional red chilli tones with depth and shine. What’s included in the 2-pack permanent hair dye kit? You’ll get 2x colour crème tubes, 2x developer milk bottles, and 2x pairs of gloves – all you need for two complete colour treatments. How long does this red chilli colour last after application? As a permanent hair dye, the colour is designed to stay vibrant for weeks, especially when paired with colour-protect aftercare products.
